tool.name: Mac Read File
tool.description: Read the contents of a file from the local filesystem.

path.description: Path to the file to read

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_file_read
Read file contents from the local filesystem.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_file_read", "query": "{\"path\": \"/path/to/file.txt\"}"}
```

**Parameters:**
- path: File path (required)
- maxBytes: Max bytes to read (default: 1MB)
- encoding: Text encoding - utf8, utf16, ascii, latin1 (default: utf8)

**Returns:** File content, size, encoding, truncation status
whenToUse: Need to read a file's contents
Viewing source code or configuration files
Reading text files on the local Mac
